name: Amendments
text: No modification or amendment to this Agreement shall be valid unless made in writing and signed by authorized representatives of both Parties.

legal_basis.note: Novation, rescission and alteration of contract
Oral evidence cannot vary written contract terms

title: Amendment
dispute_hotspots: Oral variation — party claims variation was agreed verbally
Course of dealing — party argues conduct constituted amendment
Unilateral amendment by platform terms of service — creates free consent challenge
